history.content: Can you give me a visual of all the runtime prompts youre currently getting

```mermaid
flowchart TD
  A[Runtime Prompt Stack] --> B[System Prompt]
  A --> C[Developer Instructions]
  A --> D[Session Context Blocks]
  A --> E[Live User Message]

B --> B1[Core behavior rules]
  B --> B2[Tool-use policy + safety constraints]

C --> C1[Prom persona + date/time]
  C --> C2[Plan rule: declare_plan for 2+ tool calls]
  C --> C3[Concise default response style]
  C --> C4[Do not link Prometheus repos unless asked]
  C --> C5[Browser/Desktop pre-authorized]
  C --> C6[Skill check required before every response]

D --> D1[USER.md snapshot]
  D --> D2[SOUL.md snapshot]
  D --> D3[BUSINESS.md snapshot]
  D --> D4[TOOLS.md reference note]
  D --> D5[Skill catalog summary]
  D --> D6[Goal reminder injected by runtime]

E --> E1["Can you give me a visual of all the runtime prompts youre currently getting"]

C6 --> F[Skill resolution path]
  F --> F1[skill_list]
  F --> F2[skill_read: interactive-visuals]
  F --> F3[skill_read: mermaid-diagrams]
  F --> G[Render visual response]
```
